ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol */,
  "chrom" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand on which the gene is located (+ or -) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the gene (e.g., expression level) */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, pseudogene) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic ID of the organism */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* Genome assembly version */,
  "gene_version" TEXT /* Version of the gene record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the gene data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene to which the transcript belongs */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the transcript on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the transcript on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand on which the transcript is located (+ or -) */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Type of transcript (e.g., mRNA, lncRNA) */,
  "transcript_version" TEXT /* Version of the transcript record */,
  "is_canonical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the transcript is the canonical transcript */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transcript data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript to which the exon belongs */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the exon on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the exon on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand on which the exon is located (+ or -) */,
  "exon_number" INTEGER /* Number of the exon within the transcript */,
  "phase" INTEGER /* Phase of the exon (0, 1, 2) */,
  "exon_version" TEXT /* Version of the exon record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exon data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chrom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chrom_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* Genome assembly version */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic ID of the organism */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the chromosome data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chrom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic region */,
  "chrom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome on which the region is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the region on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the region on the chromosome */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of genomic region (e.g., gene, exon, intron) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic region */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic region data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_regions_chrom_id FOREIGN KEY ("chrom_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chrom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_elements" (
  "reg_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory element */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic region to which the regulatory element belongs */,
  "reg_element_type" TEXT /* Type of regulatory element (e.g., promoter, enhancer) */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the regulatory element on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the regulatory element on the chromosome */,
  "reg_element_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory element */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the regulatory element data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reg_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_elements_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES genomic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomal_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosomal variation */,
  "chrom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome on which the variation is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of chromosomal variation (e.g., deletion, duplication) */,
  "variation_description" TEXT /* Description of the chromosomal variation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the chromosomal variation data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromosomal_variations_chrom_id FOREIGN KEY ("chrom_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chrom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene to which the data belongs */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of genomic data (e.g., expression level, variant allele frequency) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the genomic data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic data (e.g., Ensembl, NCBI) */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time at which the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission applies */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene to which the permission applies */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was granted */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data to which the file belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time at which the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the genomic data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., FASTA, VCF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)
